detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MEEKOO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MEEKOO.sol#421-493):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(min(amount,min(contractTokenBalance,_maxTaxSwap))) (MEEKOO.sol#469)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MEEKOO.sol#515-527)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MEEKOO.sol#471)
		- address(_aicall).transfer(amount) (MEEKOO.sol#575)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _balances[address(this)] = _balances[address(this)].add(_feeTax) (MEEKOO.sol#481)
	MEEKOO._balances (MEEKOO.sol#245) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MEEKOO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MEEKOO.sol#421-493)
	- MEEKOO.balanceOf(address) (MEEKOO.sol#359-363)
	- MEEKOO.constructor() (MEEKOO.sol#313-323)
	- _balances[from] = _balances[from].sub(amount) (MEEKOO.sol#487)
	MEEKOO._balances (MEEKOO.sol#245) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MEEKOO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MEEKOO.sol#421-493)
	- MEEKOO.balanceOf(address) (MEEKOO.sol#359-363)
	- MEEKOO.constructor() (MEEKOO.sol#313-323)
	- _balances[to] = _balances[to].add(amount.sub(_feeTax)) (MEEKOO.sol#489)
	MEEKOO._balances (MEEKOO.sol#245) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MEEKOO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MEEKOO.sol#421-493)
	- MEEKOO.balanceOf(address) (MEEKOO.sol#359-363)
	- MEEKOO.constructor() (MEEKOO.sol#313-323)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MEEKOO.openTrading() (MEEKOO.sol#581-597):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (MEEKOO.sol#587)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MEEKOO.sol#589)
	- IERC20(uniswapV2Pair).approve(address(uniswapV2Router),type()(uint256).max) (MEEKOO.sol#591)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MEEKOO.sol#589)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (MEEKOO.sol#595)
	MEEKOO.tradingOpen (MEEKOO.sol#293) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MEEKOO.openTrading() (MEEKOO.sol#581-597)

	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](MEEKOO.sol#L589)
	- [IERC20(uniswapV2Pair).approve(address(uniswapV2Router),type()(uint256).max)](MEEKOO.sol#L591)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](MEEKOO.sol#L589)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](MEEKOO.sol#L595)
	[MEEKOO.tradingOpen](MEEKOO.sol#L293) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MEEKOO.openTrading()](MEEKOO.sol#L581-L597)
